activities.title: Generate PKCE Challenge
activities.description: Create cryptographically random verifier (43+ chars), compute SHA-256 hash, base64url-encode as challenge. Generate random state for CSRF protection.

activities.title: Construct Authorization URL
activities.description: Build https://platform.claude.com/oauth/authorize with query parameters: client_id, response_type=code, redirect_uri, scope, code_challenge, code_challenge_method=S256, state.

activities.title: Exchange Authorization Code
activities.description: POST to https://platform.claude.com/v1/oauth/token with grant_type=authorization_code, code (from user paste), client_id, redirect_uri, code_verifier. Receive access_token, refresh_token, expires_in.

activities.title: Fetch User Profile
activities.description: GET https://api.anthropic.com/api/oauth/profile with Bearer token. Extract emailAddress, organizationUuid. These become accountId and orgID.

activities.title: Persist Credentials
activities.description: Write auth.json to {claude_home}/ with type, refresh, access, expires, email, orgID. Set file permissions to 0600.

activities.title: Refresh Expired Token
activities.description: POST to https://platform.claude.com/v1/oauth/token with grant_type=refresh_token, refresh_token, client_id, scope=(user:profile user:inference user:sessions:claude_code user:mcp_servers). Note: org:create_api_key is NOT included in refresh scopes.

activities.title: Report Authentication Status
activities.description: Populate claude_auth_status_t struct: mode, authenticated, stale, email, org_id, access_token. Check token expiry to set stale flag.
